pi_items.source: Found hardcoded in setup_task.sh as PROJECT_DIR and used to generate the project files.
Found in setup_task.sh where it dynamically generates the docker-compose.yml file with 'services: web:'.
Found in setup_task.sh where the Flask app is configured to run on port 5000, the Dockerfile binds to 5000, and docker-compose.yml maps port 5000:5000.

privileged_info_summary: The project directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/projects/quote-service. The Docker Compose service to modify is named 'web', and the web application is configured to run on port 5000.
